title: anil humilis
intro: Anil humilis, also known as the hairy ball plant, is a type of flowering shrub native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids in its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Anil humilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Anil humilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
